McpServerDefinition.description: Invoke a simple invocable class in salesforce

prompts.descriptionOverride: Drafts concise, numbered self-help troubleshooting steps for an employee's IT problem.
Retrieves information about events happening in Port Aurelia, the city surrounding the resort.

tools.descriptionOverride: Creates a new Salesforce support Case from a subject line and returns its record Id and Case Number. Use when a customer or user reports a new issue, question, or request that should be logged and tracked. Does not update or escalate existing cases.
